mandate: The operator intends to monitor and trade only these 21 mature OKX USDT perpetual swaps. Other historical or future contracts are outside the strategy mandate unless this policy is explicitly replaced before new outcome evidence is viewed.

selection_boundary.reason: mature projects selected for the operator's intended future trading scope
not_allowed: adding or removing symbols because a backtest improved
rotating into the historical top performers
using the 307-contract point-in-time universe as a mandatory promotion gate
claiming that fixed-21 evidence generalizes to the full crypto market
selection_boundary.future_replacement_rule: A delisting or permanent loss of tradability may trigger a separate prospective governance decision. No replacement may be chosen from candidate PnL or retrospective factor performance.

H22.eligibility_note: The frozen H22 implementation uses the predeclared 18-symbol funding-complete eligible subset inside the fixed 21 monitored symbols.
H22.acceptance: Keep the original 60-day/50-observation stage and 90-day/80-observation preferred prospective gates. Do not alter parameters, membership rules, cadence, direction, costs or dates after outcomes are observed.

V357.eligibility_note: The frozen V357 members continue to apply their existing warmup, reference-symbol and feature-availability rules within the fixed 21 monitored symbols.
V357.acceptance: Keep the original frozen prospective acceptance protocol. No A-grade or formal admission is allowed before all time, trade-count, cost, drawdown and concentration gates pass.

H27.role: record-only diversification observer, not an independent strategy candidate
H27.acceptance: Read only the frozen H22 and V357 prospective ledgers. Do not search weights, alter members or use historical combination results for promotion.

dynamic_universe_evidence.interpretation: The dynamic-universe audits show that H22 and V357 should not be described as portable broad-market strategies. Because the operator has now fixed the future mandate to the declared 21 mature contracts, those audits are warnings about external generalization rather than disqualifying evidence for the fixed-21 candidates.

promotion_boundary: Historical fixed-universe evidence is conditional and cannot by itself approve a strategy because the 21 symbols are known survivors as of the policy date. The prospective frozen acceptance period is the decisive evidence for this mandate.
runtime_boundary: This policy does not enable orders, positions, account access or automatic trading. The application remains SIGNAL_ONLY.
